entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume species sensitive to chilling temperatures during its reproductive phase

entities.name: CHILLING TEMPERATURES
entities.description: Temperatures below 10 degrees Celsius that cause stress in plants

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE PHASE
entities.description: The stage of plant development involving flowering and seed production

entities.name: FLORAL ABORTION
entities.description: The failure of flowers to develop, leading to reproductive failure

entities.name: ICCV 96029
entities.description: An early flowering chickpea genotype used in the study

entities.name: WARM CONDITIONS
entities.description: Control environment with average maximum and minimum temperatures greater than or equal to 28/15 degrees Celsius

entities.name: COLD CONDITIONS
entities.description: Field environment with average maximum and minimum temperatures less than or equal to 20/10 degrees Celsius

entities.name: GLASSHOUSE
entities.description: The controlled environment used for warm condition treatments

entities.name: FIELD
entities.description: The environment used for cold condition treatments

entities.name: VEGETATIVE GROWTH
entities.description: The growth of non-reproductive plant parts like leaves and stems

entities.name: PHENOLOGICAL STAGES
entities.description: The timing of biological events in the plant life cycle

entities.name: CHLOROSIS
entities.description: Yellowing of leaf tissue due to lack of chlorophyll

entities.name: NECROSIS
entities.description: Death of leaf tip tissues

entities.name: LEAF CURLING
entities.description: Abnormal curling of the whole leaf

entities.name: ABSCISSION
entities.description: The shedding of juvenile buds and flowers

entities.name: POD ABORTION
entities.description: The failure of pods to develop

entities.name: POLLEN DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of forming pollen grains, specifically at the young microspore stage

entities.name: POLLEN VIABILITY
entities.description: The ability of pollen to germinate and fertilize

entities.name: STIGMA RECEPTIVITY
entities.description: The ability of the stigma to receive and support pollen

entities.name: POLLEN GERMINATION
entities.description: The process of pollen grains sprouting on the stigma

entities.name: POLLEN TUBE GROWTH
entities.description: The growth of the tube from the pollen grain to the ovule

entities.name: FLUORESCENT STUDIES
entities.description: Technique used to observe pollen load and germination on the stigma

entities.name: FERTILIZATION
entities.description: The fusion of male and female gametes to form a zygote

entities.name: SEED FORMATION
entities.description: The final stage of reproduction resulting in the production of seeds
